$comment: Governance: written by Builder tier (Claude, 2026-06-16); validates agent YAML frontmatter. Field names are codename-neutral per Constitution §1.3.
title: Agent Frontmatter

name.description: Kebab-case identifier. Used as the subagent name when installed in .claude/agents/.

description.description: When to invoke this agent. The orchestrator reads this to decide delegation. Must be trigger-specific.

tools.description: Claude Code tools available to this agent. Principle of least privilege: list only what the role requires.

model.description: Model family. Use 'opus' for architecture and spec work; 'sonnet' for review and implementation.

profile.description: Minimum library profile that includes this agent. Agents are never part of the Minimal profile.

maturity.description: canonical = stable, team-vetted; experimental = in trial; archived = superseded.

origin.description: Source library or author. Use 'kst_promptware' for first-party agents.
